# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
    MyBucket: # Bucket resource name should be defined here as per AWS naming conventions (e.g., lowercase, no spaces) 
        Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'  
        
Outputs:         
     BucketName :          
       Description: "The URL of the S3 bucket"    # This is where we can get our output value (the name/location). It will be a link to s3 console. 
       Value: !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${MyBucket}   # Sub function in yaml for AWS Resource Name, it'll replace ${} with the actual resource id of bucket we defined above
